title: justicia kuestera
intro: Justicia kuestera, also known as wild dagga or bushman's tea, is a plant species belonging to the Acanthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia kuestera include relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into a tea by infusing them in hot water, or they can be dried and used in capsule or powder form.
